News Capstone » Signals

Signals news_app.signals

Django signal handlers for the news_app application. Registers a post_migrate signal receiver that creates the three default permission groups:

  • Reader — view-only access to articles and newsletters.
  • Editor — view, change, and delete access (used to approve and manage submitted content).
  • Journalist — full CRUD access to articles and newsletters.

Groups and permissions are created idempotently via get_or_create and set(). Imported in NewsAppConfig.ready() to ensure registration before migrations run.

@receiver(post_migrate)   def create_default_groups(sender, **kwargs)

Create Reader, Editor, and Journalist groups with correct permissions after every migration run. Scoped to the news_app label so it executes once per run rather than once per installed app.

Permissions granted:

Readerview_article, view_newsletter
Editorview/change/delete article + view/change/delete newsletter
Journalistadd/view/change/delete article + add/view/change/delete newsletter
Parameters:sender — App config that sent the signal (filtered to news_app). **kwargs — Additional signal arguments.
Returns:None — Exits early if sender.label != 'news_app'.

Built with Sphinx 8.1.3 using the Read the Docs theme. News Capstone 1.0.0.
